heading: Furlough in the Senior Executive Service
label: 3595a Furlough in the Senior Executive Service
notes: Effective DateSection effective following expiration of 90-day period beginning on , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1984 Amendment note under .Nov. 8, 1984section 307 of Pub. L. 98–615section 3393 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective following expiration of 90-day period beginning on , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1984 Amendment note under .Nov. 8, 1984section 307 of Pub. L. 98–615section 3393 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: For the purposes of this section, “furlough” means the placement of a senior executive in a temporary status in which the senior executive has no duties and is not paid when the placement in such status is by reason of insufficient work or funds or for other nondisciplinary reasons.

children.label: b
children.text: An agency may furlough a career appointee only in accordance with regulations issued by the Office of Personnel Management.

children.label: c
children.text: A career appointee who is furloughed is entitled to appeal to the Merit Systems Protection Board under .section 7701 of this title
